fields.label: Enable Intercompany Invoicing
fields.description: When a Sales Invoice from a Sales Quote is submitted, automatically create intercompany Sales and Purchase Invoices for legs where the job's company differs from the quote's billing company.

fields.label: Intercompany Relationships
fields.description: Define billing company / operating company pairs and the internal Customer (in operating co) and internal Supplier (in billing co) to use for intercompany invoices.
